rationale: The cited paper is used mainly as background evidence that spatial intercorrelation modeling has prior marketing applications, including prediction of price elasticity and sales velocity across markets. In the citing paper, it appears as part of broad literature-positioning statements rather than as a method, model component, or empirical benchmark that is directly reused or tested. The core contribution of the citing paper (sampling and network-topology bias in estimating social intercorrelations) is developed independently of this specific cited study.
